'''mangïfkïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycorrhisation|mycorrhisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycorrhisation|mycorrhisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| mangïfkïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mængïfkïfth || mængïfkïfj || mængïfkïfsh || mængïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || mangïfngïfkïfth || mangïfngïfkïfj || mangïfngïfkïfsh || mangïfngïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || mangïfkïfth || mangïfkïfj || mangïfkïfsh || mangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || mangïffkïffth || mangïffkïffj || mangïffkïffsh || mangïffkïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || mangïfkïfïf || mangïfkïfïf || mangïfkïfïf || mangïfkïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || mangïfkïfth || mangïfkïfj || mangïfkïfsh || mangïfkïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || mangïfkïfïfl || mangïfkïfïfl || mangïfkïfïfl || mangïfkïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || mangïfkïfïfïf || mangïfkïfïfïf || mangïfkïfïfïf || mangïfkïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || mangïfkïfïfn || mangïfkïfïfn || mangïfkïfïfn || mangïfkïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || mangïfkïfïforo || mangïfkïfïforo || mangïfkïfïforo || mangïfkïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
